remote-pi.prd:
{
  "title": "remote-pi v2",
  "problem": "Connect to pi sessions running on a PC from an Android phone over Tailscale. List sessions, start new ones in any folder, and replicate pi's TUI features.",
  "goals": [
    "Bridge: Node.js WebSocket+REST bridge that lists sessions, browses filesystem, and forwards pi --mode rpc",
    "Android App: React Native (Expo) app with session list, folder picker, and chat UI",
    "Chat UI must support: markdown tables, bash syntax highlighting, token cost display, thinking blocks, tool execution cards",
    "Auto-build APK via GitHub Actions on every push",
    "Publish to GitHub repo named 'remote-pi'"
  ],
  "architecture": {
    "bridge": {
      "tech": "Node.js 20+, TypeScript, ws library",
      "port": 8765,
      "rest_endpoints": [
        "GET /health",
        "GET /api/sessions — list all sessions from ~/.pi/agent/sessions/ with token/cost stats",
        "GET /api/fs?path= — browse directory entries",
        "POST /api/sessions — create new session in given cwd"
      ],
      "websocket": {
        "auth": "Bearer token via first auth message",
        "init": "client sends {type:'init', sessionId?|cwd?}",
        "forwarding": "all JSON lines between client and pi --mode rpc process"
      }
    },
    "app": {
      "tech": "React Native 0.76, Expo SDK 52, React Navigation v7",
      "screens": [
        "ConnectScreen — enter bridge URL + auth token",
        "SessionsScreen — list sessions from bridge REST API, search/filter, tap to connect",
        "BrowserScreen — folder picker via bridge REST API, confirm to start new session",
        "ChatScreen — full chat with markdown, tables, bash highlights, thinking, tools, token badge"
      ],
      "services": [
        "api.ts — REST client for bridge",
        "websocket.ts — WebSocket client with auto-reconnect, event bus"
      ],
      "components": [
        "MarkdownRenderer — wraps react-native-markdown-display with custom rules for tables, code blocks",
        "CodeBlock — custom renderer with regex-based bash syntax highlighting",
        "ThinkingBlock — expandable/collapsible thinking text",
        "ToolCard — structured tool execution display (name, args, result, isError)",
        "TokenBadge — shows session token/cost stats",
        "ExtensionUIModal — handles select/confirm/input/editor/notify from bridge"
      ]
    },
    "ci_cd": {
      "tech": "GitHub Actions",
      "workflow": "Build Android APK on ubuntu-latest using expo prebuild + gradlew assembleRelease",
      "artifact": "Upload APK as workflow artifact"
    }
  },
  "session_list_data_model": {
    "id": "session uuid",
    "name": "optional display name",
    "cwd": "working directory",
    "path": "full path to .jsonl file",
    "messageCount": "number of user+assistant messages",
    "modified": "last activity timestamp ms",
    "created": "session creation timestamp ms",
    "tokens": { "input": 0, "output": 0, "cacheRead": 0, "cacheWrite": 0, "total": 0 },
    "cost": "total USD cost"
  },
  "rpc_events_handled": [
    "message_start / message_end / message_update (text_delta, thinking_delta)",
    "agent_start / agent_end",
    "tool_execution_start / tool_execution_end / tool_execution_update",
    "queue_update",
    "extension_ui_request",
    "system"
  ],
  "non_goals": [
    "No iOS support",
    "No multiple concurrent sessions per app instance",
    "No local LLM inference on phone",
    "No editing/compaction UI (view-only for now)"
  ],
  "open_questions": []
}

Handles session discovery from ~/.pi/agent/sessions/, directory browsing, new session creation, WebSocket auth, pi process spawn/attach, bidirectional JSON-line forwarding, and extension UI interception with cancel/timeout support.","criteria":["GET /health returns 200","GET /api/sessions lists sessions with token/cost stats","GET /api/fs?path= returns directory entries (dirs first, hidden files excluded)","POST /api/sessions creates a new session in the provided cwd","WebSocket auth handshake with {type:\"auth\",token} succeeds","WS {type:\"init\",sessionId|cwd} attaches to existing session or spawns new pi process","Client messages forwarded as JSON lines to pi stdin","Pi stdout JSON lines forwarded to WS client","Extension UI requests intercepted with timeout/cancel support"]},{"id":2,"title":"Android App — Session Management & Folder Browser","files":["app/package.json","app/App.tsx","app/src/types.ts","app/src/services/api.ts","app/src/screens/ConnectScreen.tsx","app/src/screens/SessionsScreen.tsx","app/src/screens/BrowserScreen.tsx"],"task":"Expo React Native scaffold with React Navigation v7, AsyncStorage persistence, REST API client, and the three session-management screens. ConnectScreen captures bridge URL + token. SessionsScreen lists sessions with search/filter. BrowserScreen picks folders via /api/fs.
